{{Infobox character
| name = Mari
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bait]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bait]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Mari is a young girl, approximately ten years of age, who functions as the designated bait for her group due to her vulnerable appearance. She possesses long, curly hair and large eyes that frequently make her look as though she is on the verge of tears, a trait that often prompts strangers to offer her sympathy. Within her relationship with [[Shera]], Mari adopts a maternal role, acting as a caretaker who manages [[Shera]]'s well-being and provides guidance on when to feel fear. Despite her role as bait, she is capable of assisting others by communicating with figures like [[Maxwell]] and checking for intruders.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As a girl serving as the [[Bait]] in killing operations, Mari was shot in the chest by [[Maxwell]]. Following this injury, her body was found slumped against a cage. Although she played the role of the [[Bait]], she would have preferred that the man in the apron be left alive. Eventually, her corpse was seen by [[Shera]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mari]] is a girl who serves as the [[Bait]] in killing operations.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mari]] is a character who was shot in the chest by [[Maxwell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mari]]'s body was slumped against a cage.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mari]] played the [[Bait]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mari]] would have wanted the man in the apron to be left alive.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mari]] is a character whose corpse is seen by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Mari]] is a friend of [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
